verbGlossary.SCOPED BY: {source} scope and complexity is defined by {target} attribute (e.g., design development scope varies by project type)
verbGlossary.GOVERNED BY: {source} requirements and procedures are dictated by {target} attribute's regulatory or contractual standards
verbGlossary.CALIBRATED TO: {source} effort and detail level is calibrated to match {target} value band or cost expectations
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED BY: {source} cost or duration is compared to {target} normalized metric for industry comparison
verbGlossary.DETERMINED BY: {source} inclusion or exclusion is determined by {target} attribute (e.g., demolition determined by new vs. existing)
verbGlossary.STRUCTURED BY: {source} workflow and sequence is organized according to the target delivery method or procurement approach
verbGlossary.TRIGGERED BY: {source} is activated because {target} attribute applies (e.g., demolition triggered by existing building renovation)
verbGlossary.CONSTRAINED BY: {source} execution is limited or complicated by {target} attribute's conditions
verbGlossary.SPECIFIED BY: {source} material and performance requirements are defined by {target} or environmental attribute
verbGlossary.REQUIRED BY: {source} is mandated by {target} requirement as a prerequisite for compliance
verbGlossary.SCALED BY: {source} duration or effort scales proportionally with {target} size attribute
verbGlossary.SEGMENTED BY: {source} metric is broken down by {target} attribute to identify type-specific performance patterns
verbGlossary.SCHEDULED BY: {source} timing is determined by {target} seasonal conditions for optimal performance verification
verbGlossary.INITIATED BY: {source} kickoff and direction is initiated by {target} requirements and priorities
verbGlossary.SHAPED BY: {source} structure and deliverables are shaped by {target} specific needs (e.g., capital vs. tenant improvement)
verbGlossary.ADJUSTED FOR: {source} estimates are adjusted for {target} labor and material cost differences
verbGlossary.BOUNDED BY: {source} duration is constrained within the time envelope set by {target}
verbGlossary.DRIVEN BY: {source} workload and complexity is driven by the number and type of {target} or scope elements
verbGlossary.ACCELERATED BY: {source} timeline is shortened by {target} off the critical path
verbGlossary.INTENSIFIED BY: {source} safety protocols are heightened because of {target} condition attribute
